script.name: lib.cycrow.table.data
script.sourceplaintext:
$text = null
$ITEM = $a.item skip if $ITEM return null
if is datatype[ $ITEM ] == DATATYPE_WARE if $a.text == 'ware.name' $text = sprintf: fmt='%s', $ITEM, null, null, null, null else if $a.text == 'ware.tc' $text = get transport class of ware $ITEM skip if $a.forSort $text = get short transport class name: class=$text else if $a.text == 'ware.vol' $text = get volume of ware $ITEM skip if $a.forSort $text = convert number $text to string else if $a.text == 'ware.avgprice' $text = get average price of ware $ITEM skip if $a.forSort $text = convert number $text to string end
if $a.item2 -> exists if $a.item2 -> is of class Station if $a.text == 'station.warebar' $ware.max = $a.item2 -> get max amount of ware $ITEM that can be stored in cargo bay $ware.amt = $a.item2 -> get amount of ware $ITEM in cargo bay $tmp = fixed multiply and divide: $ware.amt * 100 / $ware.max if $a.forSort $text = $tmp else $text = create custom menu string progress: width=110 progress=$tmp% $ware.amt = convert number $ware.amt to string $ware.max = convert number $ware.max to string $text2 = sprintf: fmt='%s / %s', $ware.amt, $ware.max, null, null, null $text = create new array, size=7, elements='#SPLIT#', 0, null, $text, 5, [MenuColour.Cyan], $text2, null end end end end
else if $ITEM -> exists if $a.text == 'obj.name' $text = $ITEM -> get name
else if $a.text == 'obj.class' if $a.forSort $array = create new array, size=15, elements=M5, M4, M3, M8, M6, M7, M7D, M7M $array[8] = M2 $array[9] = M1 $array[10] = TS $array[11] = TP $array[12] = TM $array[13] = TL $array[14] = 'other' $text = $ITEM -> get object class $text = get index of $text in array $array offset=0 + 1 skip if $text $text = size of array $array $text = $text * 2 $tmp = $ITEM -> get ship variation do if $tmp == 20 inc $text = else $text = $ITEM -> get object class $text = sprintf: fmt='%s', $text, null, null, null, null if $ITEM -> is of class Ship $tmp = $ITEM -> get ship variation do if $tmp == 20 $text = sprintf: fmt='%s+', $text, null, null, null, null end end
else if $a.text == 'obj.idcode' $text = $ITEM -> get ID code
else if $a.text == 'obj.shield' $text = create custom menu string shield/hull: ship/station=$ITEM Width=50
else if $a.text == 'obj.cargo' $text = $ITEM -> get cargo bay size skip if $a.forSort $text = convert number $text to string
else if $a.text == 'obj.sector' $text = $ITEM -> get sector $text = $text -> get name end
if $ITEM -> is of class Ship if $a.text == 'ship.command' if $ITEM ->get command display override $text = $ITEM ->get command display override else $text = $ITEM -> get command $text = get command name: command=$text end end end end
do if $text return $text
$guilds.page = get global variable: name='pageid.guilds' if $guilds.page $Guild.Data = get global variable: name='guilds.data' if $Guild.Data $table.networks = $Guild.Data['logistics']['networks'] $task.data = $Guild.Data['tasks']
if is datatype[ $ITEM ] == DATATYPE_WARE if $a.item2 -> exists if $a.item2 -> is of class Station $table = $table.networks[$a.extra]['stations'] $table = $table[$a.item2]
if $a.text == 'station.logistics.minstorage' $data = $table[2][$ITEM] if $data == -1 $text = '-' else $text = convert number $data to string end else if $a.text == 'station.logistics.maxstorage' $data = $table[3][$ITEM] if $data == -1 $text = '-' else $text = convert number $data to string end end end end
else if is datatype[ $ITEM ] == DATATYPE_ARRAY
else if is datatype[ $ITEM ] == DATATYPE_INT if $a.text == 'guilds.task.name' $text = $task.data[$ITEM][2] else if $a.text == 'guilds.task.guild' $text = $task.data[$ITEM][0] $text = $Guild.Data[$text]['name'] $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=$text end
else if $ITEM -> is of class Ship if $a.text == 'ship.logisitics.job' $text = '-' $table = $table.networks[$a.extra]['using.ships'] if $table $data = $table[$ITEM] if $data $text = $data[0] if not $a.forSort $tmp = $data[3] $text = sprintf: fmt='%s (%s)', $text, $tmp, null, null, null end end end
else if $a.text == 'ship.logistics.status' $table = $table.networks[$a.extra]['using.ships'] if $table $text = '-' $data = $table[$ITEM] if $data if $data[5] $text = $data[5] $text = $text + 4229 if not $a.forSort $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=$text end end end end end
else if $ITEM -> is of class Station if $a.text == 'station.logistics.import' $table = $table.networks[$a.extra]['stations'] $table = $table[$ITEM][2] $text = '-' $size = size of table $table if $size == 1 $text = get next key: table=$table key=null $text = sprintf: fmt='%s', $text, null, null, null, null else if $size > 1 if $a.forSort $text = get next key: table=$table key=null $text = sprintf: fmt='%s', $text, null, null, null, null else $data = sort table keys: table=$table $text = combine string array: $data, separator=', ' $text = sprintf: fmt='(%s) %s', $size, $text, null, null, null end end
else if $a.text == 'station.logistics.export' $table = $table.networks[$a.extra]['stations'] $table = $table[$ITEM][3] $text = '-' $size = size of table $table if $size == 1 $text = get next key: table=$table key=null $text = sprintf: fmt='%s', $text, null, null, null, null else if $size > 1 if $a.forSort $text = get next key: table=$table key=null $text = sprintf: fmt='%s', $text, null, null, null, null else $data = sort table keys: table=$table $text = combine string array: $data, separator=', ' $text = sprintf: fmt='(%s) %s', $size, $text, null, null, null end end
else if $a.text == 'station.logistics.prio' $table = $table.networks[$a.extra]['stations'] $data = $table[$ITEM][1] do if $data < 1 OR $data > 5 $data = 3 if $a.forSort $text = $data else $text = $data + 4203 $text = read text: page=$guilds.page id=$text end end end end end
return $text

line.text: get short transport class name: class=
that can be stored in cargo bay
create custom menu string progress: width=
create custom menu string shield/hull: ship/station=
